hero.subtitle: Your AI-powered workplace agent that transforms meetings into actionable outcomes
hero.description: Automatically process Microsoft Teams meetings, extract decisions and TODOs, and sync them to Jira—all while you focus on what matters.

autonomous.title: Autonomous Agent
autonomous.description: Works in the background, no manual intervention needed

extraction.title: Smart Extraction
extraction.description: Identifies decisions and actionable tasks from conversations

sync.title: Auto-Sync
sync.description: Pushes TODOs directly to Jira with proper assignees

alerts.configRequired: Agent configuration required. See README.md for setup instructions.
